routes.task: Learn the CLI surface or flag schema
Trace session lifecycle and session-owned commands
Trace snapshot, wait, alerts, settings, or screenshot behavior
Trace replay, test, record, and trace flows

allowedFlags.usageDescription: metro prepare: React Native project root (default: cwd)
metro prepare: detect or force the Metro launcher kind
metro prepare: public base URL used to build bundle hints
metro prepare: optional remote host bridge base URL for Metro access
metro prepare: host bridge bearer token (prefer AGENT_DEVICE_PROXY_TOKEN or AGENT_DEVICE_METRO_BEARER_TOKEN)
metro prepare: local Metro port (default: 8081)
metro prepare: host Metro listens on (default: 0.0.0.0)
metro prepare: host used for local /status polling (default: 127.0.0.1)
metro prepare: timeout while waiting for Metro to become ready
metro prepare: timeout for /status and proxy bridge calls
metro prepare: optional file path to persist the JSON result
metro prepare: always start a fresh Metro process
metro prepare: skip package-manager install when node_modules is missing

commands.helpDescription: Prepare a local Metro runtime and optionally bridge it through a remote host
commands.name: metro
commands.sessionRequirement: Does not require an active session.

allowedFlags.usageDescription: Network: include headers, bodies, or both in output

commands.helpDescription: Dump recent HTTP(s) traffic parsed from the session app log
commands.name: network
notes: `network log` is an alias for `network dump`.
commands.usage: network dump [limit] [summary|headers|body|all] [--include summary|headers|body|all] | network log [limit] [summary|headers|body|all] [--include summary|headers|body|all]

commands.helpDescription: Toggle OS settings, appearance, and app permissions (macOS supports only settings appearance <light|dark|toggle> and settings permission <grant|reset> <accessibility|screen-recording|input-monitoring>; wifi|airplane|location remain unsupported on macOS; mobile permission actions use the active session app)
commands.name: settings
commands.summary: Change OS settings and app permissions
commands.usage: settings <wifi|airplane|location> <on|off> | settings appearance <light|dark|toggle> | settings faceid <match|nonmatch|enroll|unenroll> | settings touchid <match|nonmatch|enroll|unenroll> | settings fingerprint <match|nonmatch> | settings permission <grant|deny|reset> <camera|microphone|photos|contacts|contacts-limited|notifications|calendar|location|location-always|media-library|motion|reminders|siri> [full|limited] | settings permission <grant|reset> <accessibility|screen-recording|input-monitoring>
